mapper.sql: select finance_id, asset_id, book_type, currency_code, original_value, salvage_rate, salvage_value, depreciable_value, depreciation_method, useful_life_month, depreciation_start_date, depreciation_end_date, monthly_depreciation_amount, accumulated_depreciation, net_book_value, impairment_amount, book_value, disposed_value, finance_status, last_depreciation_period, version_no, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from asset_finance
mapper.insert: insert into asset_finance ( asset_id, book_type, currency_code, original_value, salvage_rate, salvage_value, depreciable_value, depreciation_method, useful_life_month, depreciation_start_date, depreciation_end_date, monthly_depreciation_amount, accumulated_depreciation, net_book_value, impairment_amount, book_value, disposed_value, finance_status, last_depreciation_period, version_no, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{assetId}, #{bookType}, #{currencyCode}, #{originalValue}, #{salvageRate}, #{salvageValue}, #{depreciableValue}, #{depreciationMethod}, #{usefulLifeMonth}, #{depreciationStartDate}, #{depreciationEndDate}, #{monthlyDepreciationAmount}, #{accumulatedDepreciation}, #{netBookValue}, #{impairmentAmount}, #{bookValue}, #{disposedValue}, #{financeStatus}, #{lastDepreciationPeriod}, #{versionNo}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.delete:
delete from asset_finance where finance_id in
#{financeId}
